title: 怪钟疑案
summary:
Mrs. Hazard informs Miss Watrous that the police are waiting in the dining room. Miss Watrous descends the stairs to meet Detective Chief Inspector Hakaste, Mr. Huckleberry, and Constable Lamb. The detectives explain they are investigating a murder that occurred at the neighboring house belonging to Miss Pemberton between 1:30 and 2:30 PM.

The detectives show Miss Watrous a photograph of a respectable-looking man, believed to be a stranger who visited Miss Pemberton, but she claims she does not recognize him. When questioned about her movements, Miss Watrous states she was in her garden before 1:00 PM and later sat in her living room reading *The Times*. She recalls seeing Miss Pemberton walk past her front door, which faces the street, while she was sitting near the window.

Miss Watrous explains that after lunch, she performed various tasks, including doing crossword puzzles, washing dishes, and writing letters. She notes that she heard a scream from next door, which prompted her to look out the window. From her vantage point, she observed a young man and a girl at the front gate; the man appeared to be arguing with the girl before making her sit against a doorpost and then entering the house. Miss Watrous did not see Miss Pemberton return to the house before this incident. She only realized the gravity of the situation when she heard police sirens and learned of the murder.
